mapper.select:
{ CALL ${schema}..USP_MOBILE_DELIVERY_COMPLETE_SAVE_STAT ( #{instMobileMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCostClct ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCostTxt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{liftCostYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listCostTxt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{downSrvcYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{downSrvcTxt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wallFstnYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wallFstnTxt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signImg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img1 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img3 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img4 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img5 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img6 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img7 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img8 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img9 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img10 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}
) }

{ CALL ${schema}..USP_MOBILE_DELIVERY_COMPLETE_SAVE_TALK ( #{instMobileMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendComplete ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmplUserid ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{messageType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reserveDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmTlkMsg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tmplid ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
